message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Create/update table from CLI

actor "User" as user
rectangle "CLI" as cli
package "Model Spec" as model_spec
package "Database Spec" as db_spec
database "Database" as database

user -> cli : $> gaa update model
activate cli
cli <- db_spec : Read database spec file
cli <- model_spec : Read model spec file
cli -> database : Create or update table
deactivate cli

@enduml
```
